title: September 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 25''' is the 268th day of the year (269th in leap years). There are 97 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Mark Hamill]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Jamie Hyneman]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Derek Lyons]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[David Benioff]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 30|''Star Wars'' (1977) 30]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Donald Glover]] is born.
*[[1998]] – [[StarWars.com]] announces "''The Phantom Menace''" as the name of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Episode I]].
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 45|''Star Wars'' (1998) 45]] published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 13]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 39]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Mind Tricks]]'' match-three mobile puzzle game released.
*[[2013]] – [[Legacy (2013) 7|''Legacy'' (2013) 7]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Official Force Training Manual]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Felucia]], the [[TX-130 Saber-class fighter tank|TX-130]] and [[Clone commando]]s added to ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]''.
*2019 – [[Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple 2|''Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple'' 2]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Resistance - Kylo Ren 1|''Age of Resistance - Kylo Ren'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Target Vader 3|''Target Vader'' 3]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 26|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 26]] published.
*2019 – ''[[Vader Immortal – Episode II]]'' released.
*[[2024]] – [[Ahsoka 3|''Ahsoka'' 3]] published.
<noinclude>
